2_open_and_merge_docs_pr.title: docs(reference): add 12th rule — match environment-specific workload defaults to where the playbook runs

notes: The guide now has 12 rules across 6 sections.
The new rule pins the Phase 3 Vertex AI lesson: environment-specific workload defaults such as project IDs must match the deployed registration target rather than a local sandbox.
The rule explicitly pairs with the existing bare workload reference/keychain rule because both involve Jinja binding chains that can hide misconfiguration until request time.
